game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Oddmar:** Oddmar is a 2D side-scrolling action-platformer where players control the titular Viking through 24 hand-crafted levels, navigating environmental puzzles and combat encounters. Players use a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and tap a dedicated jump button on the right, with a separate attack button to wield magically imbued weapons against various foes. Progression involves completing each level, which unlocks the next in a linear fashion, and discovering new weapons and shields that grant unique combat abilities or traversal options upon collection. Levels feature physics-based puzzles requiring precise timing and movement, and players must avoid environmental hazards or defeat all enemies in a section to advance, with failure resulting from depleting Oddmar's 3 health points or falling into a bottomless pit.
game_info.description: Guide Oddmar the Viking through perilous lands in this side-scrolling platformer adventure. Navigate hand-crafted levels filled with enemies, environmental hazards, and physics-based puzzles. Collect magical weapons and shields to unlock new combat abilities. Your goal is to complete all levels by reaching the exit portal while avoiding damage and bottomless pits. You have 3 health points - use them wisely!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move Oddmar left or right
Arrow Up: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Space: Attack with current weapon
Z: Use shield ability (when shield is collected)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and jump mechanics testing. Validates that the player can move left, right, and jump correctly. Tests basic collision detection with platforms and ensures the player doesn't fall through solid surfaces.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player left and right across platforms, performing jumps at regular intervals. Test edge detection by approaching platform edges. Verify that gravity and physics work correctly by jumping and landing.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly, respond to inputs correctly, land on platforms without clipping through, and maintain proper physics behavior. No errors should occur during basic movement and jumping actions.

TEST_1.expected: Player should move smoothly, respond to inputs correctly, land on platforms without clipping through, and maintain proper physics behavior. No errors should occur during basic movement and jumping actions.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win test. This implements an optimal strategy to complete the first level and reach the win condition. Tests enemy combat, item collection, hazard avoidance, and level completion.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the level systematically, attacking enemies when encountered, collecting weapons and health pickups, avoiding hazards like spikes and pits. Move toward the exit portal while managing health and using combat abilities effectively.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete the first level by reaching the exit portal. The game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. All game mechanics including combat, item collection, and hazard interaction should work correctly without errors.

TEST_3.test_description: Enemy combat and weapon system testing. Validates that attacking enemies works correctly, damage is dealt properly, and weapon collection changes combat behavior.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Seek out enemies and engage in combat using the attack button. Collect different weapons during gameplay to test weapon switching. Verify hit detection and enemy death mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemies should take damage when attacked, be defeated after sufficient hits, and disappear from the game. Weapon collection should change player's attack properties. Combat should feel responsive and fair.

TEST_4.test_description: Health and damage system testing. Tests that the player takes damage from enemies and hazards correctly, health depletes appropriately, and game over occurs at zero health.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies and environmental hazards. Monitor health depletion and verify visual feedback. Test the game over condition by depleting all health points.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player health should decrease when hit by enemies or hazards. Health UI should update correctly. When health reaches zero, game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state with appropriate message.
TEST_4.description: Health and damage system testing. Tests that the player takes damage from enemies and hazards correctly, health depletes appropriately, and game over occurs at zero health.

TEST_5.test_description: Physics-based puzzle and platforming precision testing. Tests complex jumping sequences, moving platforms, and physics interactions required for puzzle solving.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Attempt to solve physics-based puzzles by timing jumps carefully, interacting with moving platforms, and navigating challenging platforming sections. Test edge cases like maximum jump height and distance.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Physics should behave consistently and predictably. Player should be able to solve puzzles with precise timing. Moving platforms should work correctly, and complex platforming sequences should be achievable.

TEST_5.expected: Physics should behave consistently and predictably. Player should be able to solve puzzles with precise timing. Moving platforms should work correctly, and complex platforming sequences should be achievable.
